column1: # Rule (enforced by enforce-sync.sh via pre-commit): changing an md whose enforcer
# exists requires staging the enforcer too. An md with NONE must justify why no
# enforcer exists. Add a row here as each md gets its own enforcer.

column3: entry-gate + Context7 + tasks.json + G7 (graphify) + G8 (domain patterns) + G9a (DoD integrity) + G9b (DoD completion)

enforce skill contract (4 files + registry entry)
.claudeignore required + no model-id in commit msg
